import { useState, useEffect } from "react"; export default function Navbar() { let [position, setPosition] = useState( true ); useEffect (()=> { const handleScroll = () => { if (window.scrollY >= window.innerHeight) { setPosition( false ) } else { setPosition( true ) } } window.addEventListener('scroll', handleScroll); return () => { window.removeEventListener('scroll', handleScroll); } }, []) return (
